2603.14107.title: ST-ResGAT: Explainable Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network for Road Condition Prediction and Priority-Driven Maintenance
2603.14107.paper_summary: Climate-vulnerable road networks require a paradigm shift from reactive, fix-on-failure repairs to predictive, decision-ready maintenance. This paper introduces ST-ResGAT, a novel Spatio-Temporal Residual Graph Attention Network that fuses residual graph-attention encoding with GRU temporal aggregation to forecast pavement deterioration. Engineered for resource-constrained deployment, the framework translates continuous Pavement Condition Index (PCI) forecasts directly into the American Society for Testing and Materials (ASTM)-compliant maintenance priorities. Using a real-world inspection dataset of 750 segments in Sylhet, Bangladesh (2021-2024), ST-ResGAT significantly outperforms traditional non-spatial machine learning baselines, achieving exceptional predictive fidelity (R2 = 0.93, RMSE = 2.72). Crucially, ablation testing confirmed the mathematical necessity of modeling topological neighbor effects, proving that structural decay acts as a spatial contagion. Uniquely, we integrate GNNExplainer to unbox the model, demonstrating that its learned priorities align perfectly with established physical engineering theory. Furthermore, we quantify classification safety: achieving 85.5% exact ASTM class agreement and 100% adjacent-class containment, ensuring bounded, engineer-safe predictions. To connect model outputs to policy, we generate localized longitudinal maintenance profiles, perform climate stress-testing, and derive Pareto sustainability frontiers. ST-ResGAT therefore offers a practical, explainable, and sustainable blueprint for intelligent infrastructure management in high-risk, low-resource geological settings.
2603.14107.paper_summary_zh: 氣候脆弱的道路網絡需要從反應式的故障修復轉向預測式的決策準備維護。本文介紹了ST-ResGAT，一種新穎的時空殘差圖注意力網絡，它將殘差圖注意力編碼與GRU時間聚合相融合，以預測路面劣化。該框架專為資源有限的部署而設計，將連續的路面狀況指數（PCI）預測直接轉化為符合美國材料與試驗協會（ASTM）標準的維護優先事項。使用來自孟加拉國Sylhet的750段實際檢查數據集（2021-2024），ST-ResGAT顯著超越傳統的非空間機器學習基準，實現了卓越的預測準確性（R2 = 0.93，RMSE = 2.72）。關鍵是，消融測試證實了建模拓撲鄰居效應的數學必要性，證明結構衰退作為一種空間傳染。獨特的是，我們整合了GNNExplainer來解釋模型，展示其學習的優先事項與既有的物理工程理論完全一致。此外，我們量化了分類安全性：實現了85.5%的ASTM類別精確一致性和100%的鄰近類別包容性，確保了有界的工程安全預測。為了將模型輸出與政策連接，我們生成了本地化的縱向維護檔案，進行氣候壓力測試，並推導出帕累托可持續性邊界。因此，ST-ResGAT為高風險、低資源地質環境中的智能基礎設施管理提供了一個實用、可解釋且可持續的藍圖。
2603.14107.author: Mohsin Mahmud Topu et.al.
2603.14107.authors: Mohsin Mahmud Topu, Azmine Toushik Wasi, Mahfuz Ahmed Anik, MD Manjurul Ahsan
